articles.title: Read Mumbai Heat Alert: 35°C Par Tapti City, Thane 37°C Tak Pahuncha — IMD Ne Di Warning - gallinews.com
articles.full_text:
Mumbai Heat Alert: 35°C Par Tapti City, Thane 37°C Tak Pahuncha — IMD Ne Di Warning
(IMD) ne Mumbai aur MMR region ke liye heatwave-like conditions ki warning di hai. Aane wale dino mein garmi aur humidity dono badhne wale hain.
Mumbai mein maximum temperature lagbhag 35°C tak pahunch gaya hai. Wahi Thane sabse zyada garam raha, jahan temperature 37°C record hua.
India Meteorological Department ke mutabik, clear skies aur high humidity ke chalte heat aur discomfort aur badhne wala hai, khaaskar afternoon hours mein.
Is mahine mein yeh lagataar 4th heatwave jaisi situation hai, jo batata hai ki summer iss saal jaldi aur zyada intense ho raha hai.
